Class ExtendedMappingRelation

java.lang.Object
se.liu.ida.hefquin.mappings.algebra.impl.BaseForMappingRelationImpl
se.liu.ida.hefquin.mappings.algebra.exec.ExtendedMappingRelation
All Implemented Interfaces:
MappingRelation
public class ExtendedMappingRelation extends BaseForMappingRelationImpl
A MappingRelation produced by a MappingOpExtend operator.
